{ JSON reading }
var
  InputBuf: string;
  InputPos: integer;

procedure SkipWhitespace;
begin
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] <= ' ') do
    Inc(InputPos);
end;

function ReadString: string;
var
  s: string;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] <> '"' then
  begin
    ReadString := '';
    Exit;
  end;
  Inc(InputPos);
  s := '';
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] <> '"') do
  begin
    if InputBuf[InputPos] = '\' then
    begin
      Inc(InputPos);
      if InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) then
        s := s + InputBuf[InputPos];
    end
    else
      s := s + InputBuf[InputPos];
    Inc(InputPos);
  end;
  if InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) then Inc(InputPos);
  ReadString := s;
end;

function ReadReal: real;
var
  s: string;
  start: integer;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  start := InputPos;
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and
        ((InputBuf[InputPos] in ['0'..'9', '.', '-', '+', 'e', 'E'])) do
    Inc(InputPos);
  s := Copy(InputBuf, start, InputPos - start);
  ReadReal := StrToFloat(s);
end;

function ReadInt: integer;
var
  s: string;
  start: integer;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  start := InputPos;
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] in ['0'..'9', '-']) do
    Inc(InputPos);
  s := Copy(InputBuf, start, InputPos - start);
  ReadInt := StrToInt(s);
end;

function ReadBool: boolean;
var
  s: string;
  start: integer;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  start := InputPos;
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] in ['a'..'z', 'A'..'Z']) do
    Inc(InputPos);
  s := Copy(InputBuf, start, InputPos - start);
  ReadBool := (s = 'true');
end;

procedure ReadObjectStart;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = '{' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadObjectEnd;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = '}' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadArrayStart;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = '[' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadArrayEnd;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = ']' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadComma;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = ',' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadColon;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = ':' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadRealArray(var arr: array of real; count: integer);
var
  i: integer;
begin
  ReadArrayStart;
  for i := 0 to count - 1 do
  begin
    arr[i] := ReadReal;
    if i < count - 1 then ReadComma;
  end;
  ReadArrayEnd;
end;

procedure ReadBoolArray(var arr: array of boolean; count: integer);
var
  i: integer;
begin
  ReadArrayStart;
  for i := 0 to count - 1 do
  begin
    arr[i] := ReadBool;
    if i < count - 1 then ReadComma;
  end;
  ReadArrayEnd;
end;

procedure ReadLCM;
var
  i, j: integer;
  s: string;
begin
  ReadArrayStart;
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    ReadArrayStart;
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      s := ReadString;
      if s = 'NOTUSED' then LCM[i, j] := NOTUSED
      else if s = 'ORR' then LCM[i, j] := ORR
      else if s = 'ANDD' then LCM[i, j] := ANDD;
      if j < 15 then ReadComma;
    end;
    ReadArrayEnd;
    if i < 15 then ReadComma;
  end;
  ReadArrayEnd;
end;

procedure ReadInput;
var
  key: string;
  tmpArr: array[1..15] of boolean;
begin
  ReadObjectStart;
  while InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) do
  begin
    SkipWhitespace;
    if InputBuf[InputPos] = '}' then Break;
    key := ReadString;
    ReadColon;
    if key = 'numpoints' then
    begin
      NUMPOINTS := ReadInt;
    end
    else if key = 'x' then
    begin
      ReadRealArray(X, NUMPOINTS);
    end
    else if key = 'y' then
    begin
      ReadRealArray(Y, NUMPOINTS);
    end
    else if key = 'parameters' then
    begin
      ReadObjectStart;
      while InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) do
      begin
        SkipWhitespace;
        if InputBuf[InputPos] = '}' then Break;
        key := ReadString;
        ReadColon;
        if key = 'LENGTH1' then PARAMETERS.LENGTH1 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'RADIUS1' then PARAMETERS.RADIUS1 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'EPSILON' then PARAMETERS.EPSILON := ReadReal
        else if key = 'AREA1' then PARAMETERS.AREA1 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'Q_PTS' then PARAMETERS.Q_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'QUADS' then PARAMETERS.QUADS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'DIST' then PARAMETERS.DIST := ReadReal
        else if key = 'N_PTS' then PARAMETERS.N_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'K_PTS' then PARAMETERS.K_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'A_PTS' then PARAMETERS.A_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'B_PTS' then PARAMETERS.B_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'C_PTS' then PARAMETERS.C_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'D_PTS' then PARAMETERS.D_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'E_PTS' then PARAMETERS.E_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'F_PTS' then PARAMETERS.F_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'G_PTS' then PARAMETERS.G_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'LENGTH2' then PARAMETERS.LENGTH2 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'RADIUS2' then PARAMETERS.RADIUS2 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'AREA2' then PARAMETERS.AREA2 := ReadReal;
        ReadComma;
      end;
      ReadObjectEnd;
    end
    else if key = 'lcm' then
    begin
      ReadLCM;
    end
    else if key = 'pum_diag' then
    begin
      ReadBoolArray(tmpArr, 15);
      for i := 1 to 15 do
      begin
        for j := 1 to 15 do
          PUM[i, j] := false;
        PUM[i, i] := tmpArr[i];
      end;
    end;
    end;
    ReadComma;
  end;
  ReadObjectEnd;
end;

procedure WriteOutput;
var
  i, j: integer;
  s: string;
begin
  s := '{"cmv":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if CMV[i] then s := s + 'true' else s := s + 'false';
    if i < 15 then s := s + ',';
  end;
  s := s + '],"pum":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    s := s + '[';
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if PUM[i, j] then s := s + 'true' else s := s + 'false';
      if j < 15 then s := s + ',';
    end;
    s := s + ']';
    if i < 15 then s := s + ',';
  end;
  s := s + '],"fuv":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if FUV[i] then s := s + 'true' else s := s + 'false';
    if i < 15 then s := s + ',';
  end;
  s := s + '],"launch":';
  if LAUNCH then s := s + 'true' else s := s + 'false';
  s := s + '}';
  WriteLn(s);
end;

var
  i, j: integer;
  line: string;
begin
  InputBuf := '';
  while not EOF do
  begin
    ReadLn(line);
    InputBuf := InputBuf + line;
  end;
  InputPos := 1;

  ReadInput;

  DECIDE;

  WriteOutput;
end.
","after":"program LIPDecide;

uses SysUtils, Math;

const
  PI = 3.1415926535;

type
  POINTRANGE  = 1..100;
  LICRANGE    = 1..15;
  NPOINTS     = 2..100;
  NPTYPE      = 3..100;
  CONNECTORS  = (NOTUSED, ORR, ANDD);
  NUMQUADS    = 1..3;
  COORDINATE  = array[POINTRANGE] of real;
  CMATRIX     = array[LICRANGE, LICRANGE] of CONNECTORS;
  BMATRIX     = array[LICRANGE, LICRANGE] of boolean;
  VECTOR      = array[LICRANGE] of boolean;
  COMPTYPE    = (LT, EQ, GT);

var
  X          : COORDINATE;
  Y          : COORDINATE;
  NUMPOINTS  : NPOINTS;
  PARAMETERS : record
    LENGTH1  : real;
    RADIUS1  : real;
    EPSILON  : real;
    AREA1    : real;
    Q_PTS    : NPOINTS;
    QUADS    : NUMQUADS;
    DIST     : real;
    N_PTS    : NPTYPE;
    K_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    A_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    B_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    C_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    D_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    E_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    F_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    G_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    LENGTH2  : real;
    RADIUS2  : real;
    AREA2    : real;
  end;
  LCM     : CMATRIX;
  PUM     : BMATRIX;
  CMV     : VECTOR;
  FUV     : VECTOR;
  LAUNCH  : boolean;

function REALCOMPARE(A, B: real): COMPTYPE;
var
  scale, eps, diff: real;
begin
  scale := Abs(A);
  if Abs(B) > scale then
    scale := Abs(B);
  if scale = 0.0 then
  begin
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
    Exit;
  end;

  eps := 0.5e-5 * scale;
  diff := A - B;
  if diff > eps then
    REALCOMPARE := GT
  else if diff < -eps then
    REALCOMPARE := LT
  else
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
end;

function Dist(i, j: integer): real;
begin
  Dist := Sqrt(Sqr(X[i] - X[j]) + Sqr(Y[i] - Y[j]));
end;

function CircumcircleRadius(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  a, b, c, s, area: real;
begin
  a := Dist(i, j);
  b := Dist(j, k);
  c := Dist(i, k);
  s := (a + b + c) / 2.0;
  area := Sqrt(Abs(s * (s - a) * (s - b) * (s - c)));
  if area < 1e-12 then
  begin
    if (REALCOMPARE(a, 0.0) = EQ) and (REALCOMPARE(b, 0.0) = EQ) and (REALCOMPARE(c, 0.0) = EQ) then
      CircumcircleRadius := 0.0
    else
      CircumcircleRadius := 1e30
  end
  else
    CircumcircleRadius := (a * b * c) / (4.0 * area);
end;

function TriangleArea(i, j, k: integer): real;
begin
  TriangleArea := Abs((X[j] - X[i]) * (Y[k] - Y[i]) - (X[k] - X[i]) * (Y[j] - Y[i])) / 2.0;
end;

function AngleAtVertex(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  dx1, dy1, dx2, dy2, dot, mag1, mag2, cosVal: real;
begin
  dx1 := X[i] - X[j];
  dy1 := Y[i] - Y[j];
  dx2 := X[k] - X[j];
  dy2 := Y[k] - Y[j];
  mag1 := Sqrt(dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1);
  mag2 := Sqrt(dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2);
  if (REALCOMPARE(mag1, 0.0) = EQ) or (REALCOMPARE(mag2, 0.0) = EQ) then
  begin
    AngleAtVertex := -1.0;
    Exit;
  end;
  dot := (dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2) / (mag1 * mag2);
  if dot > 1.0 then dot := 1.0;
  if dot < -1.0 then dot := -1.0;
  AngleAtVertex := ArcCos(dot);
end;

function GetQuadrant(i: integer): integer;
begin
  if REALCOMPARE(X[i], 0.0) = GT then
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = GT then GetQuadrant := 1
    else if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = LT then GetQuadrant := 4
    else GetQuadrant := 1;
  end
  else if REALCOMPARE(X[i], 0.0) = LT then
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = GT then GetQuadrant := 2
    else if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = LT then GetQuadrant := 3
    else GetQuadrant := 2;
  end
  else
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = GT then GetQuadrant := 1
    else if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = LT then GetQuadrant := 3
    else GetQuadrant := 1;
  end;
end;

function PointToLineDist(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2: real): real;
var
  dx, dy, num: real;
begin
  dx := x2 - x1;
  dy := y2 - y1;
  num := Abs(dy * px - dx * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1);
  if REALCOMPARE(Sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy), 0.0) = EQ then
    PointToLineDist := Sqrt(Sqr(px - x1) + Sqr(py - y1))
  else
    PointToLineDist := num / Sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
end;

procedure DECIDE;
var
  i, j, k, m, n: integer;
  found: boolean;
  quadSet: set of 1..4;
  quadCount: integer;
  d: real;
  angle: real;
  area: real;
  hasGreater, hasLesser: boolean;
begin
  for i := 1 to 15 do
    CMV[i] := false;

  { LIC 1: two consecutive points distance > LENGTH1 }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Dist(i, i + 1), PARAMETERS.LENGTH1) = GT then
    begin
      CMV[1] := true;
      Break;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 2: three consecutive points not in circle of radius RADIUS1 }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(CircumcircleRadius(i, i + 1, i + 2), PARAMETERS.RADIUS1) = GT then
    begin
      CMV[2] := true;
      Break;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 3: three consecutive points angle outside (PI-EPSILON, PI+EPSILON) }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    angle := AngleAtVertex(i, i + 1, i + 2);
    if angle >= 0.0 then
    begin
      if (REALCOMPARE(angle, PI - PARAMETERS.EPSILON) = LT) or
         (REALCOMPARE(angle, PI + PARAMETERS.EPSILON) = GT) then
      begin
        CMV[3] := true;
        Break;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 4: three consecutive points triangle area > AREA1 }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(TriangleArea(i, i + 1, i + 2), PARAMETERS.AREA1) = GT then
    begin
      CMV[4] := true;
      Break;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 5: Q_PTS consecutive points in more than QUADS quadrants }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.Q_PTS + 1 do
  begin
    quadSet := [];
    for j := 0 to PARAMETERS.Q_PTS - 1 do
      quadSet := quadSet + [GetQuadrant(i + j)];
    quadCount := 0;
    for m := 1 to 4 do
      if m in quadSet then Inc(quadCount);
    if quadCount > PARAMETERS.QUADS then
    begin
      CMV[5] := true;
      Break;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 6: two consecutive points X[j] - X[i] < 0 where j = i+1 }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(X[i + 1] - X[i], 0.0) = LT then
    begin
      CMV[6] := true;
      Break;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 7: N_PTS consecutive points, one point distance > DIST from line }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 3 then
  begin
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.N_PTS + 1 do
    begin
      found := false;
      for j := i to i + PARAMETERS.N_PTS - 1 do
      begin
        d := PointToLineDist(X[j], Y[j], X[i], Y[i], X[i + PARAMETERS.N_PTS - 1], Y[i + PARAMETERS.N_PTS - 1]);
        if REALCOMPARE(d, PARAMETERS.DIST) = GT then
        begin
          found := true;
          Break;
        end;
      end;
      if found then
      begin
        CMV[7] := true;
        Break;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 8: two points separated by K_PTS intervening points, distance > LENGTH1 }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 3 then
  begin
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.K_PTS - 1 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.K_PTS + 1;
      if REALCOMPARE(Dist(i, j), PARAMETERS.LENGTH1) = GT then
      begin
        CMV[8] := true;
        Break;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 9: three points separated by A_PTS and B_PTS, not in circle of radius RADIUS1 }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 5 then
  begin
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.A_PTS - PARAMETERS.B_PTS - 2 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.A_PTS + 1;
      k := j + PARAMETERS.B_PTS + 1;
      if REALCOMPARE(CircumcircleRadius(i, j, k), PARAMETERS.RADIUS1) = GT then
      begin
        CMV[9] := true;
        Break;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 10: three points separated by C_PTS and D_PTS, angle outside range }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 5 then
  begin
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.C_PTS - PARAMETERS.D_PTS - 2 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.C_PTS + 1;
      k := j + PARAMETERS.D_PTS + 1;
      angle := AngleAtVertex(i, j, k);
      if angle >= 0.0 then
      begin
        if (REALCOMPARE(angle, PI - PARAMETERS.EPSILON) = LT) or
           (REALCOMPARE(angle, PI + PARAMETERS.EPSILON) = GT) then
        begin
          CMV[10] := true;
          Break;
        end;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 11: three points separated by E_PTS and F_PTS, triangle area > AREA1 }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 5 then
  begin
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.E_PTS - PARAMETERS.F_PTS - 2 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.E_PTS + 1;
      k := j + PARAMETERS.F_PTS + 1;
      if REALCOMPARE(TriangleArea(i, j, k), PARAMETERS.AREA1) = GT then
      begin
        CMV[11] := true;
        Break;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 12: two points separated by G_PTS intervening points, X[j]-X[i] < 0 }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 3 then
  begin
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.G_PTS - 1 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.G_PTS + 1;
      if REALCOMPARE(X[j] - X[i], 0.0) = LT then
      begin
        CMV[12] := true;
        Break;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 13: two parts: distance > LENGTH1 AND distance < LENGTH2, both with K_PTS separation }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 3 then
  begin
    hasGreater := false;
    hasLesser := false;
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.K_PTS - 1 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.K_PTS + 1;
      d := Dist(i, j);
      if REALCOMPARE(d, PARAMETERS.LENGTH1) = GT then
        hasGreater := true;
      if REALCOMPARE(d, PARAMETERS.LENGTH2) = LT then
        hasLesser := true;
    end;
    CMV[13] := hasGreater and hasLesser;
  end;

  { LIC 14: not in circle RADIUS1 AND in circle RADIUS2, both with A_PTS, B_PTS separation }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 5 then
  begin
    hasGreater := false;
    hasLesser := false;
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.A_PTS - PARAMETERS.B_PTS - 2 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.A_PTS + 1;
      k := j + PARAMETERS.B_PTS + 1;
      d := CircumcircleRadius(i, j, k);
      if REALCOMPARE(d, PARAMETERS.RADIUS1) = GT then
        hasGreater := true;
      if REALCOMPARE(d, PARAMETERS.RADIUS2) = LT then
        hasLesser := true;
    end;
    CMV[14] := hasGreater and hasLesser;
  end;

  { LIC 15: area > AREA1 AND area < AREA2, both with E_PTS, F_PTS separation }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 5 then
  begin
    hasGreater := false;
    hasLesser := false;
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.E_PTS - PARAMETERS.F_PTS - 2 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.E_PTS + 1;
      k := j + PARAMETERS.F_PTS + 1;
      area := TriangleArea(i, j, k);
      if REALCOMPARE(area, PARAMETERS.AREA1) = GT then
        hasGreater := true;
      if REALCOMPARE(area, PARAMETERS.AREA2) = LT then
        hasLesser := true;
    end;
    CMV[15] := hasGreater and hasLesser;
  end;

  { PUM: off-diagonal from LCM, diagonal from input }
  for i := 1 to 15 do
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if i = j then
        PUM[i, j] := PUM[i, j]
      else
      begin
        case LCM[i, j] of
          NOTUSED: PUM[i, j] := true;
          ANDD:    PUM[i, j] := CMV[i] and CMV[j];
          ORR:     PUM[i, j] := CMV[i] or CMV[j];
        end;
      end;
    end;

  { FUV }
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if not PUM[i, i] then
      FUV[i] := true
    else
    begin
      found := true;
      for j := 1 to 15 do
        if not PUM[i, j] then
        begin
          found := false;
          Break;
        end;
      FUV[i] := found;
    end;
  end;

  { LAUNCH }
  LAUNCH := true;
  for i := 1 to 15 do
    if not FUV[i] then
    begin
      LAUNCH := false;
      Break;
    end;
end;

{ JSON reading }
var
  InputBuf: string;
  InputPos: integer;

procedure SkipWhitespace;
begin
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] <= ' ') do
    Inc(InputPos);
end;

function ReadString: string;
var
  s: string;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] <> '"' then
  begin
    ReadString := '';
    Exit;
  end;
  Inc(InputPos);
  s := '';
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] <> '"') do
  begin
    if InputBuf[InputPos] = '\' then
    begin
      Inc(InputPos);
      if InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) then
        s := s + InputBuf[InputPos];
    end
    else
      s := s + InputBuf[InputPos];
    Inc(InputPos);
  end;
  if InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) then Inc(InputPos);
  ReadString := s;
end;

function ReadReal: real;
var
  s: string;
  start: integer;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  start := InputPos;
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and
        ((InputBuf[InputPos] in ['0'..'9', '.', '-', '+', 'e', 'E'])) do
    Inc(InputPos);
  s := Copy(InputBuf, start, InputPos - start);
  ReadReal := StrToFloat(s);
end;

function ReadInt: integer;
var
  s: string;
  start: integer;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  start := InputPos;
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] in ['0'..'9', '-']) do
    Inc(InputPos);
  s := Copy(InputBuf, start, InputPos - start);
  ReadInt := StrToInt(s);
end;

function ReadBool: boolean;
var
  s: string;
  start: integer;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  start := InputPos;
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] in ['a'..'z', 'A'..'Z']) do
    Inc(InputPos);
  s := Copy(InputBuf, start, InputPos - start);
  ReadBool := (s = 'true');
end;

procedure ReadObjectStart;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = '{' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadObjectEnd;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = '}' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadArrayStart;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = '[' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadArrayEnd;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = ']' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadComma;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = ',' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadColon;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = ':' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadRealArray(var arr: array of real; count: integer);
var
  i: integer;
begin
  ReadArrayStart;
  for i := 0 to count - 1 do
  begin
    arr[i] := ReadReal;
    if i < count - 1 then ReadComma;
  end;
  ReadArrayEnd;
end;

procedure ReadBoolArray(var arr: array of boolean; count: integer);
var
  i: integer;
begin
  ReadArrayStart;
  for i := 0 to count - 1 do
  begin
    arr[i] := ReadBool;
    if i < count - 1 then ReadComma;
  end;
  ReadArrayEnd;
end;

procedure ReadLCM;
var
  i, j: integer;
  s: string;
begin
  ReadArrayStart;
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    ReadArrayStart;
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      s := ReadString;
      if s = 'NOTUSED' then LCM[i, j] := NOTUSED
      else if s = 'ORR' then LCM[i, j] := ORR
      else if s = 'ANDD' then LCM[i, j] := ANDD;
      if j < 15 then ReadComma;
    end;
    ReadArrayEnd;
    if i < 15 then ReadComma;
  end;
  ReadArrayEnd;
end;

procedure ReadInput;
var
  key: string;
  tmpArr: array[1..15] of boolean;
  li, lj: integer;
begin
  ReadObjectStart;
  while InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) do
  begin
    SkipWhitespace;
    if InputBuf[InputPos] = '}' then Break;
    key := ReadString;
    ReadColon;
    if key = 'numpoints' then
    begin
      NUMPOINTS := ReadInt;
    end
    else if key = 'x' then
    begin
      ReadRealArray(X, NUMPOINTS);
    end
    else if key = 'y' then
    begin
      ReadRealArray(Y, NUMPOINTS);
    end
    else if key = 'parameters' then
    begin
      ReadObjectStart;
      while InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) do
      begin
        SkipWhitespace;
        if InputBuf[InputPos] = '}' then Break;
        key := ReadString;
        ReadColon;
        if key = 'LENGTH1' then PARAMETERS.LENGTH1 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'RADIUS1' then PARAMETERS.RADIUS1 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'EPSILON' then PARAMETERS.EPSILON := ReadReal
        else if key = 'AREA1' then PARAMETERS.AREA1 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'Q_PTS' then PARAMETERS.Q_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'QUADS' then PARAMETERS.QUADS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'DIST' then PARAMETERS.DIST := ReadReal
        else if key = 'N_PTS' then PARAMETERS.N_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'K_PTS' then PARAMETERS.K_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'A_PTS' then PARAMETERS.A_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'B_PTS' then PARAMETERS.B_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'C_PTS' then PARAMETERS.C_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'D_PTS' then PARAMETERS.D_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'E_PTS' then PARAMETERS.E_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'F_PTS' then PARAMETERS.F_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'G_PTS' then PARAMETERS.G_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'LENGTH2' then PARAMETERS.LENGTH2 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'RADIUS2' then PARAMETERS.RADIUS2 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'AREA2' then PARAMETERS.AREA2 := ReadReal;
        ReadComma;
      end;
      ReadObjectEnd;
    end
    else if key = 'lcm' then
    begin
      ReadLCM;
    end
    else if key = 'pum_diag' then
    begin
      ReadBoolArray(tmpArr, 15);
      for li := 1 to 15 do
      begin
        for lj := 1 to 15 do
          PUM[li, lj] := false;
        PUM[li, li] := tmpArr[li];
      end;
    end;
    ReadComma;
  end;
  ReadObjectEnd;
end;

procedure WriteOutput;
var
  i, j: integer;
  s: string;
begin
  s := '{"cmv":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if CMV[i] then s := s + 'true' else s := s + 'false';
    if i < 15 then s := s + ',';
  end;
  s := s + '],"pum":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    s := s + '[';
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if PUM[i, j] then s := s + 'true' else s := s + 'false';
      if j < 15 then s := s + ',';
    end;
    s := s + ']';
    if i < 15 then s := s + ',';
  end;
  s := s + '],"fuv":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if FUV[i] then s := s + 'true' else s := s + 'false';
    if i < 15 then s := s + ',';
  end;
  s := s + '],"launch":';
  if LAUNCH then s := s + 'true' else s := s + 'false';
  s := s + '}';
  WriteLn(s);
end;

var
  i, j: integer;
  line: string;
begin
  InputBuf := '';
  while not EOF do
  begin
    ReadLn(line);
    InputBuf := InputBuf + line;
  end;
  InputPos := 1;

  ReadInput;

  DECIDE;

  WriteOutput;
end.

","filediff":{"file":"/tmp/nvp_opencode_l_tjdfok/lipdecide.pas","before":"program LIPDecide;

uses SysUtils, Math;

const
  PI = 3.1415926535;

type
  POINTRANGE  = 1..100;
  LICRANGE    = 1..15;
  NPOINTS     = 2..100;
  NPTYPE      = 3..100;
  CONNECTORS  = (NOTUSED, ORR, ANDD);
  NUMQUADS    = 1..3;
  COORDINATE  = array[POINTRANGE] of real;
  CMATRIX     = array[LICRANGE, LICRANGE] of CONNECTORS;
  BMATRIX     = array[LICRANGE, LICRANGE] of boolean;
  VECTOR      = array[LICRANGE] of boolean;
  COMPTYPE    = (LT, EQ, GT);

var
  X          : COORDINATE;
  Y          : COORDINATE;
  NUMPOINTS  : NPOINTS;
  PARAMETERS : record
    LENGTH1  : real;
    RADIUS1  : real;
    EPSILON  : real;
    AREA1    : real;
    Q_PTS    : NPOINTS;
    QUADS    : NUMQUADS;
    DIST     : real;
    N_PTS    : NPTYPE;
    K_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    A_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    B_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    C_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    D_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    E_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    F_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    G_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    LENGTH2  : real;
    RADIUS2  : real;
    AREA2    : real;
  end;
  LCM     : CMATRIX;
  PUM     : BMATRIX;
  CMV     : VECTOR;
  FUV     : VECTOR;
  LAUNCH  : boolean;

function REALCOMPARE(A, B: real): COMPTYPE;
var
  scale, eps, diff: real;
begin
  scale := Abs(A);
  if Abs(B) > scale then
    scale := Abs(B);
  if scale = 0.0 then
  begin
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
    Exit;
  end;

  eps := 0.5e-5 * scale;
  diff := A - B;
  if diff > eps then
    REALCOMPARE := GT
  else if diff < -eps then
    REALCOMPARE := LT
  else
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
end;

function Dist(i, j: integer): real;
begin
  Dist := Sqrt(Sqr(X[i] - X[j]) + Sqr(Y[i] - Y[j]));
end;

function CircumcircleRadius(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  a, b, c, s, area: real;
begin
  a := Dist(i, j);
  b := Dist(j, k);
  c := Dist(i, k);
  s := (a + b + c) / 2.0;
  area := Sqrt(Abs(s * (s - a) * (s - b) * (s - c)));
  if area < 1e-12 then
  begin
    if (REALCOMPARE(a, 0.0) = EQ) and (REALCOMPARE(b, 0.0) = EQ) and (REALCOMPARE(c, 0.0) = EQ) then
      CircumcircleRadius := 0.0
    else
      CircumcircleRadius := 1e30
  end
  else
    CircumcircleRadius := (a * b * c) / (4.0 * area);
end;

function TriangleArea(i, j, k: integer): real;
begin
  TriangleArea := Abs((X[j] - X[i]) * (Y[k] - Y[i]) - (X[k] - X[i]) * (Y[j] - Y[i])) / 2.0;
end;

function AngleAtVertex(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  dx1, dy1, dx2, dy2, dot, mag1, mag2, cosVal: real;
begin
  dx1 := X[i] - X[j];
  dy1 := Y[i] - Y[j];
  dx2 := X[k] - X[j];
  dy2 := Y[k] - Y[j];
  mag1 := Sqrt(dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1);
  mag2 := Sqrt(dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2);
  if (REALCOMPARE(mag1, 0.0) = EQ) or (REALCOMPARE(mag2, 0.0) = EQ) then
  begin
    AngleAtVertex := -1.0;
    Exit;
  end;
  dot := (dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2) / (mag1 * mag2);
  if dot > 1.0 then dot := 1.0;
  if dot < -1.0 then dot := -1.0;
  AngleAtVertex := ArcCos(dot);
end;

function GetQuadrant(i: integer): integer;
begin
  if REALCOMPARE(X[i], 0.0) = GT then
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = GT then GetQuadrant := 1
    else if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = LT then GetQuadrant := 4
    else GetQuadrant := 1;
  end
  else if REALCOMPARE(X[i], 0.0) = LT then
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = GT then GetQuadrant := 2
    else if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = LT then GetQuadrant := 3
    else GetQuadrant := 2;
  end
  else
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = GT then GetQuadrant := 1
    else if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = LT then GetQuadrant := 3
    else GetQuadrant := 1;
  end;
end;

function PointToLineDist(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2: real): real;
var
  dx, dy, num: real;
begin
  dx := x2 - x1;
  dy := y2 - y1;
  num := Abs(dy * px - dx * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1);
  if REALCOMPARE(Sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy), 0.0) = EQ then
    PointToLineDist := Sqrt(Sqr(px - x1) + Sqr(py - y1))
  else
    PointToLineDist := num / Sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
end;

procedure DECIDE;
var
  i, j, k, m, n: integer;
  found: boolean;
  quadSet: set of 1..4;
  quadCount: integer;
  d: real;
  angle: real;
  area: real;
  hasGreater, hasLesser: boolean;
begin
  for i := 1 to 15 do
    CMV[i] := false;

  { LIC 1: two consecutive points distance > LENGTH1 }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Dist(i, i + 1), PARAMETERS.LENGTH1) = GT then
    begin
      CMV[1] := true;
      Break;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 2: three consecutive points not in circle of radius RADIUS1 }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(CircumcircleRadius(i, i + 1, i + 2), PARAMETERS.RADIUS1) = GT then
    begin
      CMV[2] := true;
      Break;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 3: three consecutive points angle outside (PI-EPSILON, PI+EPSILON) }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    angle := AngleAtVertex(i, i + 1, i + 2);
    if angle >= 0.0 then
    begin
      if (REALCOMPARE(angle, PI - PARAMETERS.EPSILON) = LT) or
         (REALCOMPARE(angle, PI + PARAMETERS.EPSILON) = GT) then
      begin
        CMV[3] := true;
        Break;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 4: three consecutive points triangle area > AREA1 }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(TriangleArea(i, i + 1, i + 2), PARAMETERS.AREA1) = GT then
    begin
      CMV[4] := true;
      Break;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 5: Q_PTS consecutive points in more than QUADS quadrants }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.Q_PTS + 1 do
  begin
    quadSet := [];
    for j := 0 to PARAMETERS.Q_PTS - 1 do
      quadSet := quadSet + [GetQuadrant(i + j)];
    quadCount := 0;
    for m := 1 to 4 do
      if m in quadSet then Inc(quadCount);
    if quadCount > PARAMETERS.QUADS then
    begin
      CMV[5] := true;
      Break;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 6: two consecutive points X[j] - X[i] < 0 where j = i+1 }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(X[i + 1] - X[i], 0.0) = LT then
    begin
      CMV[6] := true;
      Break;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 7: N_PTS consecutive points, one point distance > DIST from line }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 3 then
  begin
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.N_PTS + 1 do
    begin
      found := false;
      for j := i to i + PARAMETERS.N_PTS - 1 do
      begin
        d := PointToLineDist(X[j], Y[j], X[i], Y[i], X[i + PARAMETERS.N_PTS - 1], Y[i + PARAMETERS.N_PTS - 1]);
        if REALCOMPARE(d, PARAMETERS.DIST) = GT then
        begin
          found := true;
          Break;
        end;
      end;
      if found then
      begin
        CMV[7] := true;
        Break;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 8: two points separated by K_PTS intervening points, distance > LENGTH1 }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 3 then
  begin
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.K_PTS - 1 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.K_PTS + 1;
      if REALCOMPARE(Dist(i, j), PARAMETERS.LENGTH1) = GT then
      begin
        CMV[8] := true;
        Break;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 9: three points separated by A_PTS and B_PTS, not in circle of radius RADIUS1 }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 5 then
  begin
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.A_PTS - PARAMETERS.B_PTS - 2 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.A_PTS + 1;
      k := j + PARAMETERS.B_PTS + 1;
      if REALCOMPARE(CircumcircleRadius(i, j, k), PARAMETERS.RADIUS1) = GT then
      begin
        CMV[9] := true;
        Break;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 10: three points separated by C_PTS and D_PTS, angle outside range }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 5 then
  begin
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.C_PTS - PARAMETERS.D_PTS - 2 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.C_PTS + 1;
      k := j + PARAMETERS.D_PTS + 1;
      angle := AngleAtVertex(i, j, k);
      if angle >= 0.0 then
      begin
        if (REALCOMPARE(angle, PI - PARAMETERS.EPSILON) = LT) or
           (REALCOMPARE(angle, PI + PARAMETERS.EPSILON) = GT) then
        begin
          CMV[10] := true;
          Break;
        end;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 11: three points separated by E_PTS and F_PTS, triangle area > AREA1 }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 5 then
  begin
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.E_PTS - PARAMETERS.F_PTS - 2 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.E_PTS + 1;
      k := j + PARAMETERS.F_PTS + 1;
      if REALCOMPARE(TriangleArea(i, j, k), PARAMETERS.AREA1) = GT then
      begin
        CMV[11] := true;
        Break;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 12: two points separated by G_PTS intervening points, X[j]-X[i] < 0 }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 3 then
  begin
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.G_PTS - 1 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.G_PTS + 1;
      if REALCOMPARE(X[j] - X[i], 0.0) = LT then
      begin
        CMV[12] := true;
        Break;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 13: two parts: distance > LENGTH1 AND distance < LENGTH2, both with K_PTS separation }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 3 then
  begin
    hasGreater := false;
    hasLesser := false;
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.K_PTS - 1 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.K_PTS + 1;
      d := Dist(i, j);
      if REALCOMPARE(d, PARAMETERS.LENGTH1) = GT then
        hasGreater := true;
      if REALCOMPARE(d, PARAMETERS.LENGTH2) = LT then
        hasLesser := true;
    end;
    CMV[13] := hasGreater and hasLesser;
  end;

  { LIC 14: not in circle RADIUS1 AND in circle RADIUS2, both with A_PTS, B_PTS separation }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 5 then
  begin
    hasGreater := false;
    hasLesser := false;
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.A_PTS - PARAMETERS.B_PTS - 2 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.A_PTS + 1;
      k := j + PARAMETERS.B_PTS + 1;
      d := CircumcircleRadius(i, j, k);
      if REALCOMPARE(d, PARAMETERS.RADIUS1) = GT then
        hasGreater := true;
      if REALCOMPARE(d, PARAMETERS.RADIUS2) = LT then
        hasLesser := true;
    end;
    CMV[14] := hasGreater and hasLesser;
  end;

  { LIC 15: area > AREA1 AND area < AREA2, both with E_PTS, F_PTS separation }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 5 then
  begin
    hasGreater := false;
    hasLesser := false;
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.E_PTS - PARAMETERS.F_PTS - 2 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.E_PTS + 1;
      k := j + PARAMETERS.F_PTS + 1;
      area := TriangleArea(i, j, k);
      if REALCOMPARE(area, PARAMETERS.AREA1) = GT then
        hasGreater := true;
      if REALCOMPARE(area, PARAMETERS.AREA2) = LT then
        hasLesser := true;
    end;
    CMV[15] := hasGreater and hasLesser;
  end;

  { PUM: off-diagonal from LCM, diagonal from input }
  for i := 1 to 15 do
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if i = j then
        PUM[i, j] := PUM[i, j]
      else
      begin
        case LCM[i, j] of
          NOTUSED: PUM[i, j] := true;
          ANDD:    PUM[i, j] := CMV[i] and CMV[j];
          ORR:     PUM[i, j] := CMV[i] or CMV[j];
        end;
      end;
    end;

  { FUV }
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if not PUM[i, i] then
      FUV[i] := true
    else
    begin
      found := true;
      for j := 1 to 15 do
        if not PUM[i, j] then
        begin
          found := false;
          Break;
        end;
      FUV[i] := found;
    end;
  end;

  { LAUNCH }
  LAUNCH := true;
  for i := 1 to 15 do
    if not FUV[i] then
    begin
      LAUNCH := false;
      Break;
    end;
end;

{ JSON reading }
var
  InputBuf: string;
  InputPos: integer;

procedure SkipWhitespace;
begin
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] <= ' ') do
    Inc(InputPos);
end;

function ReadString: string;
var
  s: string;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] <> '"' then
  begin
    ReadString := '';
    Exit;
  end;
  Inc(InputPos);
  s := '';
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] <> '"') do
  begin
    if InputBuf[InputPos] = '\' then
    begin
      Inc(InputPos);
      if InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) then
        s := s + InputBuf[InputPos];
    end
    else
      s := s + InputBuf[InputPos];
    Inc(InputPos);
  end;
  if InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) then Inc(InputPos);
  ReadString := s;
end;

function ReadReal: real;
var
  s: string;
  start: integer;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  start := InputPos;
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and
        ((InputBuf[InputPos] in ['0'..'9', '.', '-', '+', 'e', 'E'])) do
    Inc(InputPos);
  s := Copy(InputBuf, start, InputPos - start);
  ReadReal := StrToFloat(s);
end;

function ReadInt: integer;
var
  s: string;
  start: integer;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  start := InputPos;
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] in ['0'..'9', '-']) do
    Inc(InputPos);
  s := Copy(InputBuf, start, InputPos - start);
  ReadInt := StrToInt(s);
end;

function ReadBool: boolean;
var
  s: string;
  start: integer;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  start := InputPos;
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] in ['a'..'z', 'A'..'Z']) do
    Inc(InputPos);
  s := Copy(InputBuf, start, InputPos - start);
  ReadBool := (s = 'true');
end;

procedure ReadObjectStart;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = '{' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadObjectEnd;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = '}' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadArrayStart;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = '[' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadArrayEnd;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = ']' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadComma;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = ',' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadColon;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = ':' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadRealArray(var arr: array of real; count: integer);
var
  i: integer;
begin
  ReadArrayStart;
  for i := 0 to count - 1 do
  begin
    arr[i] := ReadReal;
    if i < count - 1 then ReadComma;
  end;
  ReadArrayEnd;
end;

procedure ReadBoolArray(var arr: array of boolean; count: integer);
var
  i: integer;
begin
  ReadArrayStart;
  for i := 0 to count - 1 do
  begin
    arr[i] := ReadBool;
    if i < count - 1 then ReadComma;
  end;
  ReadArrayEnd;
end;

procedure ReadLCM;
var
  i, j: integer;
  s: string;
begin
  ReadArrayStart;
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    ReadArrayStart;
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      s := ReadString;
      if s = 'NOTUSED' then LCM[i, j] := NOTUSED
      else if s = 'ORR' then LCM[i, j] := ORR
      else if s = 'ANDD' then LCM[i, j] := ANDD;
      if j < 15 then ReadComma;
    end;
    ReadArrayEnd;
    if i < 15 then ReadComma;
  end;
  ReadArrayEnd;
end;

procedure ReadInput;
var
  key: string;
  tmpArr: array[1..15] of boolean;
  li, lj: integer;
begin
  ReadObjectStart;
  while InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) do
  begin
    SkipWhitespace;
    if InputBuf[InputPos] = '}' then Break;
    key := ReadString;
    ReadColon;
    if key = 'numpoints' then
    begin
      NUMPOINTS := ReadInt;
    end
    else if key = 'x' then
    begin
      ReadRealArray(X, NUMPOINTS);
    end
    else if key = 'y' then
    begin
      ReadRealArray(Y, NUMPOINTS);
    end
    else if key = 'parameters' then
    begin
      ReadObjectStart;
      while InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) do
      begin
        SkipWhitespace;
        if InputBuf[InputPos] = '}' then Break;
        key := ReadString;
        ReadColon;
        if key = 'LENGTH1' then PARAMETERS.LENGTH1 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'RADIUS1' then PARAMETERS.RADIUS1 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'EPSILON' then PARAMETERS.EPSILON := ReadReal
        else if key = 'AREA1' then PARAMETERS.AREA1 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'Q_PTS' then PARAMETERS.Q_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'QUADS' then PARAMETERS.QUADS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'DIST' then PARAMETERS.DIST := ReadReal
        else if key = 'N_PTS' then PARAMETERS.N_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'K_PTS' then PARAMETERS.K_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'A_PTS' then PARAMETERS.A_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'B_PTS' then PARAMETERS.B_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'C_PTS' then PARAMETERS.C_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'D_PTS' then PARAMETERS.D_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'E_PTS' then PARAMETERS.E_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'F_PTS' then PARAMETERS.F_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'G_PTS' then PARAMETERS.G_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'LENGTH2' then PARAMETERS.LENGTH2 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'RADIUS2' then PARAMETERS.RADIUS2 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'AREA2' then PARAMETERS.AREA2 := ReadReal;
        ReadComma;
      end;
      ReadObjectEnd;
    end
    else if key = 'lcm' then
    begin
      ReadLCM;
    end
    else if key = 'pum_diag' then
    begin
      ReadBoolArray(tmpArr, 15);
      for li := 1 to 15 do
      begin
        for lj := 1 to 15 do
          PUM[li, lj] := false;
        PUM[li, li] := tmpArr[li];
      end;
    end;
    ReadComma;
  end;
  ReadObjectEnd;
end;
      ReadObjectEnd;
    end
    else if key = 'lcm' then
    begin
      ReadLCM;
    end
    else if key = 'pum_diag' then
    begin
      ReadBoolArray(tmpArr, 15);
      for li := 1 to 15 do
      begin
        for lj := 1 to 15 do
          PUM[li, lj] := false;
        PUM[li, li] := tmpArr[li];
      end;
    end;
    ReadComma;
  end;
  ReadObjectEnd;
end;

procedure WriteOutput;
var
  i, j: integer;
  s: string;
begin
  s := '{"cmv":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if CMV[i] then s := s + 'true' else s := s + 'false';
    if i < 15 then s := s + ',';
  end;
  s := s + '],"pum":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    s := s + '[';
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if PUM[i, j] then s := s + 'true' else s := s + 'false';
      if j < 15 then s := s + ',';
    end;
    s := s + ']';
    if i < 15 then s := s + ',';
  end;
  s := s + '],"fuv":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if FUV[i] then s := s + 'true' else s := s + 'false';
    if i < 15 then s := s + ',';
  end;
  s := s + '],"launch":';
  if LAUNCH then s := s + 'true' else s := s + 'false';
  s := s + '}';
  WriteLn(s);
end;

var
  i, j: integer;
  line: string;
begin
  InputBuf := '';
  while not EOF do
  begin
    ReadLn(line);
    InputBuf := InputBuf + line;
  end;
  InputPos := 1;

  ReadInput;

  DECIDE;

  WriteOutput;
end.
","after":"program LIPDecide;

uses SysUtils, Math;

const
  PI = 3.1415926535;

type
  POINTRANGE  = 1..100;
  LICRANGE    = 1..15;
  NPOINTS     = 2..100;
  NPTYPE      = 3..100;
  CONNECTORS  = (NOTUSED, ORR, ANDD);
  NUMQUADS    = 1..3;
  COORDINATE  = array[POINTRANGE] of real;
  CMATRIX     = array[LICRANGE, LICRANGE] of CONNECTORS;
  BMATRIX     = array[LICRANGE, LICRANGE] of boolean;
  VECTOR      = array[LICRANGE] of boolean;
  COMPTYPE    = (LT, EQ, GT);

var
  X          : COORDINATE;
  Y          : COORDINATE;
  NUMPOINTS  : NPOINTS;
  PARAMETERS : record
    LENGTH1  : real;
    RADIUS1  : real;
    EPSILON  : real;
    AREA1    : real;
    Q_PTS    : NPOINTS;
    QUADS    : NUMQUADS;
    DIST     : real;
    N_PTS    : NPTYPE;
    K_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    A_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    B_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    C_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    D_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    E_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    F_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    G_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    LENGTH2  : real;
    RADIUS2  : real;
    AREA2    : real;
  end;
  LCM     : CMATRIX;
  PUM     : BMATRIX;
  CMV     : VECTOR;
  FUV     : VECTOR;
  LAUNCH  : boolean;

function REALCOMPARE(A, B: real): COMPTYPE;
var
  scale, eps, diff: real;
begin
  scale := Abs(A);
  if Abs(B) > scale then
    scale := Abs(B);
  if scale = 0.0 then
  begin
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
    Exit;
  end;

  eps := 0.5e-5 * scale;
  diff := A - B;
  if diff > eps then
    REALCOMPARE := GT
  else if diff < -eps then
    REALCOMPARE := LT
  else
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
end;

function Dist(i, j: integer): real;
begin
  Dist := Sqrt(Sqr(X[i] - X[j]) + Sqr(Y[i] - Y[j]));
end;

function CircumcircleRadius(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  a, b, c, s, area: real;
begin
  a := Dist(i, j);
  b := Dist(j, k);
  c := Dist(i, k);
  s := (a + b + c) / 2.0;
  area := Sqrt(Abs(s * (s - a) * (s - b) * (s - c)));
  if area < 1e-12 then
  begin
    if (REALCOMPARE(a, 0.0) = EQ) and (REALCOMPARE(b, 0.0) = EQ) and (REALCOMPARE(c, 0.0) = EQ) then
      CircumcircleRadius := 0.0
    else
      CircumcircleRadius := 1e30
  end
  else
    CircumcircleRadius := (a * b * c) / (4.0 * area);
end;

function TriangleArea(i, j, k: integer): real;
begin
  TriangleArea := Abs((X[j] - X[i]) * (Y[k] - Y[i]) - (X[k] - X[i]) * (Y[j] - Y[i])) / 2.0;
end;

function AngleAtVertex(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  dx1, dy1, dx2, dy2, dot, mag1, mag2, cosVal: real;
begin
  dx1 := X[i] - X[j];
  dy1 := Y[i] - Y[j];
  dx2 := X[k] - X[j];
  dy2 := Y[k] - Y[j];
  mag1 := Sqrt(dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1);
  mag2 := Sqrt(dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2);
  if (REALCOMPARE(mag1, 0.0) = EQ) or (REALCOMPARE(mag2, 0.0) = EQ) then
  begin
    AngleAtVertex := -1.0;
    Exit;
  end;
  dot := (dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2) / (mag1 * mag2);
  if dot > 1.0 then dot := 1.0;
  if dot < -1.0 then dot := -1.0;
  AngleAtVertex := ArcCos(dot);
end;

function GetQuadrant(i: integer): integer;
begin
  if REALCOMPARE(X[i], 0.0) = GT then
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = GT then GetQuadrant := 1
    else if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = LT then GetQuadrant := 4
    else GetQuadrant := 1;
  end
  else if REALCOMPARE(X[i], 0.0) = LT then
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = GT then GetQuadrant := 2
    else if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = LT then GetQuadrant := 3
    else GetQuadrant := 2;
  end
  else
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = GT then GetQuadrant := 1
    else if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = LT then GetQuadrant := 3
    else GetQuadrant := 1;
  end;
end;

function PointToLineDist(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2: real): real;
var
  dx, dy, num: real;
begin
  dx := x2 - x1;
  dy := y2 - y1;
  num := Abs(dy * px - dx * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1);
  if REALCOMPARE(Sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy), 0.0) = EQ then
    PointToLineDist := Sqrt(Sqr(px - x1) + Sqr(py - y1))
  else
    PointToLineDist := num / Sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
end;

procedure DECIDE;
var
  i, j, k, m, n: integer;
  found: boolean;
  quadSet: set of 1..4;
  quadCount: integer;
  d: real;
  angle: real;
  area: real;
  hasGreater, hasLesser: boolean;
begin
  for i := 1 to 15 do
    CMV[i] := false;

  { LIC 1: two consecutive points distance > LENGTH1 }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Dist(i, i + 1), PARAMETERS.LENGTH1) = GT then
    begin
      CMV[1] := true;
      Break;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 2: three consecutive points not in circle of radius RADIUS1 }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(CircumcircleRadius(i, i + 1, i + 2), PARAMETERS.RADIUS1) = GT then
    begin
      CMV[2] := true;
      Break;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 3: three consecutive points angle outside (PI-EPSILON, PI+EPSILON) }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    angle := AngleAtVertex(i, i + 1, i + 2);
    if angle >= 0.0 then
    begin
      if (REALCOMPARE(angle, PI - PARAMETERS.EPSILON) = LT) or
         (REALCOMPARE(angle, PI + PARAMETERS.EPSILON) = GT) then
      begin
        CMV[3] := true;
        Break;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 4: three consecutive points triangle area > AREA1 }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(TriangleArea(i, i + 1, i + 2), PARAMETERS.AREA1) = GT then
    begin
      CMV[4] := true;
      Break;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 5: Q_PTS consecutive points in more than QUADS quadrants }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.Q_PTS + 1 do

{ JSON reading }
var
  InputBuf: string;
  InputPos: integer;

procedure SkipWhitespace;
begin
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] <= ' ') do
    Inc(InputPos);
end;

function ReadString: string;
var
  s: string;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] <> '"' then
  begin
    ReadString := '';
    Exit;
  end;
  Inc(InputPos);
  s := '';
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] <> '"') do
  begin
    if InputBuf[InputPos] = '\' then
    begin
      Inc(InputPos);
      if InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) then
        s := s + InputBuf[InputPos];
    end
    else
      s := s + InputBuf[InputPos];
    Inc(InputPos);
  end;
  if InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) then Inc(InputPos);
  ReadString := s;
end;

function ReadReal: real;
var
  s: string;
  start: integer;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  start := InputPos;
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and
        ((InputBuf[InputPos] in ['0'..'9', '.', '-', '+', 'e', 'E'])) do
    Inc(InputPos);
  s := Copy(InputBuf, start, InputPos - start);
  ReadReal := StrToFloat(s);
end;

function ReadInt: integer;
var
  s: string;
  start: integer;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  start := InputPos;
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] in ['0'..'9', '-']) do
    Inc(InputPos);
  s := Copy(InputBuf, start, InputPos - start);
  ReadInt := StrToInt(s);
end;

function ReadBool: boolean;
var
  s: string;
  start: integer;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  start := InputPos;
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] in ['a'..'z', 'A'..'Z']) do
    Inc(InputPos);
  s := Copy(InputBuf, start, InputPos - start);
  ReadBool := (s = 'true');
end;

procedure ReadObjectStart;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = '{' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadObjectEnd;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = '}' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadArrayStart;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = '[' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadArrayEnd;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = ']' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadComma;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = ',' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadColon;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = ':' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadRealArray(var arr: array of real; count: integer);
var
  i: integer;
begin
  ReadArrayStart;
  for i := 0 to count - 1 do
  begin
    arr[i] := ReadReal;
    if i < count - 1 then ReadComma;
  end;
  ReadArrayEnd;
end;

procedure ReadBoolArray(var arr: array of boolean; count: integer);
var
  i: integer;
begin
  ReadArrayStart;
  for i := 0 to count - 1 do
  begin
    arr[i] := ReadBool;
    if i < count - 1 then ReadComma;
  end;
  ReadArrayEnd;
end;

procedure ReadLCM;
var
  i, j: integer;
  s: string;
begin
  ReadArrayStart;
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    ReadArrayStart;
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      s := ReadString;
      if s = 'NOTUSED' then LCM[i, j] := NOTUSED
      else if s = 'ORR' then LCM[i, j] := ORR
      else if s = 'ANDD' then LCM[i, j] := ANDD;
      if j < 15 then ReadComma;
    end;
    ReadArrayEnd;
    if i < 15 then ReadComma;
  end;
  ReadArrayEnd;
end;

procedure ReadInput;
var
  key: string;
  tmpArr: array[1..15] of boolean;
  li, lj: integer;
begin
  ReadObjectStart;
  while InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) do
  begin
    SkipWhitespace;
    if InputBuf[InputPos] = '}' then Break;
    key := ReadString;
    ReadColon;
    if key = 'numpoints' then
    begin
      NUMPOINTS := ReadInt;
    end
    else if key = 'x' then
    begin
      ReadRealArray(X, NUMPOINTS);
    end
    else if key = 'y' then
    begin
      ReadRealArray(Y, NUMPOINTS);
    end
    else if key = 'parameters' then
    begin
      ReadObjectStart;
      while InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) do
      begin
        SkipWhitespace;
        if InputBuf[InputPos] = '}' then Break;
        key := ReadString;
        ReadColon;
        if key = 'LENGTH1' then PARAMETERS.LENGTH1 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'RADIUS1' then PARAMETERS.RADIUS1 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'EPSILON' then PARAMETERS.EPSILON := ReadReal
        else if key = 'AREA1' then PARAMETERS.AREA1 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'Q_PTS' then PARAMETERS.Q_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'QUADS' then PARAMETERS.QUADS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'DIST' then PARAMETERS.DIST := ReadReal
        else if key = 'N_PTS' then PARAMETERS.N_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'K_PTS' then PARAMETERS.K_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'A_PTS' then PARAMETERS.A_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'B_PTS' then PARAMETERS.B_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'C_PTS' then PARAMETERS.C_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'D_PTS' then PARAMETERS.D_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'E_PTS' then PARAMETERS.E_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'F_PTS' then PARAMETERS.F_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'G_PTS' then PARAMETERS.G_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'LENGTH2' then PARAMETERS.LENGTH2 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'RADIUS2' then PARAMETERS.RADIUS2 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'AREA2' then PARAMETERS.AREA2 := ReadReal;
        ReadComma;
      end;
      ReadObjectEnd;
    end
    else if key = 'lcm' then
    begin
      ReadLCM;
    end
    else if key = 'pum_diag' then
    begin
      ReadBoolArray(tmpArr, 15);
      for li := 1 to 15 do
      begin
        for lj := 1 to 15 do
          PUM[li, lj] := false;
        PUM[li, li] := tmpArr[li];
      end;
    end;
    ReadComma;
  end;
  ReadObjectEnd;
end;

procedure WriteOutput;
var
  i, j: integer;
  s: string;
begin
  s := '{"cmv":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if CMV[i] then s := s + 'true' else s := s + 'false';
    if i < 15 then s := s + ',';
  end;
  s := s + '],"pum":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    s := s + '[';
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if PUM[i, j] then s := s + 'true' else s := s + 'false';
      if j < 15 then s := s + ',';
    end;
    s := s + ']';
    if i < 15 then s := s + ',';
  end;
  s := s + '],"fuv":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if FUV[i] then s := s + 'true' else s := s + 'false';
    if i < 15 then s := s + ',';
  end;
  s := s + '],"launch":';
  if LAUNCH then s := s + 'true' else s := s + 'false';
  s := s + '}';
  WriteLn(s);
end;

var
  i, j: integer;
  line: string;
begin
  InputBuf := '';
  while not EOF do
  begin
    ReadLn(line);
    InputBuf := InputBuf + line;
  end;
  InputPos := 1;

  ReadInput;

  DECIDE;

  WriteOutput;
end.

uses SysUtils, Math;

const
  PI = 3.1415926535;

type
  POINTRANGE  = 1..100;
  LICRANGE    = 1..15;
  NPOINTS     = 2..100;
  NPTYPE      = 3..100;
  CONNECTORS  = (NOTUSED, ORR, ANDD);
  NUMQUADS    = 1..3;
  COORDINATE  = array[POINTRANGE] of real;
  CMATRIX     = array[LICRANGE, LICRANGE] of CONNECTORS;
  BMATRIX     = array[LICRANGE, LICRANGE] of boolean;
  VECTOR      = array[LICRANGE] of boolean;
  COMPTYPE    = (LT, EQ, GT);

var
  X          : COORDINATE;
  Y          : COORDINATE;
  NUMPOINTS  : NPOINTS;
  PARAMETERS : record
    LENGTH1  : real;
    RADIUS1  : real;
    EPSILON  : real;
    AREA1    : real;
    Q_PTS    : NPOINTS;
    QUADS    : NUMQUADS;
    DIST     : real;
    N_PTS    : NPTYPE;
    K_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    A_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    B_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    C_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    D_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    E_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    F_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    G_PTS    : POINTRANGE;
    LENGTH2  : real;
    RADIUS2  : real;
    AREA2    : real;
  end;
  LCM     : CMATRIX;
  PUM     : BMATRIX;
  CMV     : VECTOR;
  FUV     : VECTOR;
  LAUNCH  : boolean;

function REALCOMPARE(A, B: real): COMPTYPE;
var
  scale, eps, diff: real;
begin
  scale := Abs(A);
  if Abs(B) > scale then
    scale := Abs(B);
  if scale = 0.0 then
  begin
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
    Exit;
  end;

  eps := 0.5e-5 * scale;
  diff := A - B;
  if diff > eps then
    REALCOMPARE := GT
  else if diff < -eps then
    REALCOMPARE := LT
  else
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
end;

function Dist(i, j: integer): real;
begin
  Dist := Sqrt(Sqr(X[i] - X[j]) + Sqr(Y[i] - Y[j]));
end;

function CircumcircleRadius(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  a, b, c, s, area: real;
begin
  a := Dist(i, j);
  b := Dist(j, k);
  c := Dist(i, k);
  s := (a + b + c) / 2.0;
  area := Sqrt(Abs(s * (s - a) * (s - b) * (s - c)));
  if area < 1e-12 then
  begin
    if (REALCOMPARE(a, 0.0) = EQ) and (REALCOMPARE(b, 0.0) = EQ) and (REALCOMPARE(c, 0.0) = EQ) then
      CircumcircleRadius := 0.0
    else
      CircumcircleRadius := 1e30
  end
  else
    CircumcircleRadius := (a * b * c) / (4.0 * area);
end;

function TriangleArea(i, j, k: integer): real;
begin
  TriangleArea := Abs((X[j] - X[i]) * (Y[k] - Y[i]) - (X[k] - X[i]) * (Y[j] - Y[i])) / 2.0;
end;

function AngleAtVertex(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  dx1, dy1, dx2, dy2, dot, mag1, mag2, cosVal: real;
begin
  dx1 := X[i] - X[j];
  dy1 := Y[i] - Y[j];
  dx2 := X[k] - X[j];
  dy2 := Y[k] - Y[j];
  mag1 := Sqrt(dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1);
  mag2 := Sqrt(dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2);
  if (REALCOMPARE(mag1, 0.0) = EQ) or (REALCOMPARE(mag2, 0.0) = EQ) then
  begin
    AngleAtVertex := -1.0;
    Exit;
  end;
  dot := (dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2) / (mag1 * mag2);
  if dot > 1.0 then dot := 1.0;
  if dot < -1.0 then dot := -1.0;
  AngleAtVertex := ArcCos(dot);
end;

function GetQuadrant(i: integer): integer;
begin
  if REALCOMPARE(X[i], 0.0) = GT then
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = GT then GetQuadrant := 1
    else if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = LT then GetQuadrant := 4
    else GetQuadrant := 1;
  end
  else if REALCOMPARE(X[i], 0.0) = LT then
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = GT then GetQuadrant := 2
    else if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = LT then GetQuadrant := 3
    else GetQuadrant := 2;
  end
  else
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = GT then GetQuadrant := 1
    else if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = LT then GetQuadrant := 3
    else GetQuadrant := 1;
  end;
end;

function PointToLineDist(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2: real): real;
var
  dx, dy, num: real;
begin
  dx := x2 - x1;
  dy := y2 - y1;
  num := Abs(dy * px - dx * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1);
  if REALCOMPARE(Sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy), 0.0) = EQ then
    PointToLineDist := Sqrt(Sqr(px - x1) + Sqr(py - y1))
  else
    PointToLineDist := num / Sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
end;

procedure DECIDE;
var
  i, j, k, m, n: integer;
  found: boolean;
  quadSet: set of 1..4;
  quadCount: integer;
  d: real;
  angle: real;
  area: real;
  hasGreater, hasLesser: boolean;
begin
  for i := 1 to 15 do
    CMV[i] := false;

  { LIC 1: two consecutive points distance > LENGTH1 }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Dist(i, i + 1), PARAMETERS.LENGTH1) = GT then
    begin
      CMV[1] := true;
      Break;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 2: three consecutive points not in circle of radius RADIUS1 }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(CircumcircleRadius(i, i + 1, i + 2), PARAMETERS.RADIUS1) = GT then
    begin
      CMV[2] := true;
      Break;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 3: three consecutive points angle outside (PI-EPSILON, PI+EPSILON) }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    angle := AngleAtVertex(i, i + 1, i + 2);
    if angle >= 0.0 then
    begin
      if (REALCOMPARE(angle, PI - PARAMETERS.EPSILON) = LT) or
         (REALCOMPARE(angle, PI + PARAMETERS.EPSILON) = GT) then
      begin
        CMV[3] := true;
        Break;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 4: three consecutive points triangle area > AREA1 }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(TriangleArea(i, i + 1, i + 2), PARAMETERS.AREA1) = GT then
    begin
      CMV[4] := true;
      Break;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 5: Q_PTS consecutive points in more than QUADS quadrants }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.Q_PTS + 1 do
  begin
    quadSet := [];
    for j := 0 to PARAMETERS.Q_PTS - 1 do
      quadSet := quadSet + [GetQuadrant(i + j)];
    quadCount := 0;
    for m := 1 to 4 do
      if m in quadSet then Inc(quadCount);
    if quadCount > PARAMETERS.QUADS then
    begin
      CMV[5] := true;
      Break;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 6: two consecutive points X[j] - X[i] < 0 where j = i+1 }
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(X[i + 1] - X[i], 0.0) = LT then
    begin
      CMV[6] := true;
      Break;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 7: N_PTS consecutive points, one point distance > DIST from line }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 3 then
  begin
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.N_PTS + 1 do
    begin
      found := false;
      for j := i to i + PARAMETERS.N_PTS - 1 do
      begin
        d := PointToLineDist(X[j], Y[j], X[i], Y[i], X[i + PARAMETERS.N_PTS - 1], Y[i + PARAMETERS.N_PTS - 1]);
        if REALCOMPARE(d, PARAMETERS.DIST) = GT then
        begin
          found := true;
          Break;
        end;
      end;
      if found then
      begin
        CMV[7] := true;
        Break;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 8: two points separated by K_PTS intervening points, distance > LENGTH1 }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 3 then
  begin
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.K_PTS - 1 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.K_PTS + 1;
      if REALCOMPARE(Dist(i, j), PARAMETERS.LENGTH1) = GT then
      begin
        CMV[8] := true;
        Break;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 9: three points separated by A_PTS and B_PTS, not in circle of radius RADIUS1 }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 5 then
  begin
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.A_PTS - PARAMETERS.B_PTS - 2 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.A_PTS + 1;
      k := j + PARAMETERS.B_PTS + 1;
      if REALCOMPARE(CircumcircleRadius(i, j, k), PARAMETERS.RADIUS1) = GT then
      begin
        CMV[9] := true;
        Break;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 10: three points separated by C_PTS and D_PTS, angle outside range }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 5 then
  begin
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.C_PTS - PARAMETERS.D_PTS - 2 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.C_PTS + 1;
      k := j + PARAMETERS.D_PTS + 1;
      angle := AngleAtVertex(i, j, k);
      if angle >= 0.0 then
      begin
        if (REALCOMPARE(angle, PI - PARAMETERS.EPSILON) = LT) or
           (REALCOMPARE(angle, PI + PARAMETERS.EPSILON) = GT) then
        begin
          CMV[10] := true;
          Break;
        end;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 11: three points separated by E_PTS and F_PTS, triangle area > AREA1 }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 5 then
  begin
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.E_PTS - PARAMETERS.F_PTS - 2 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.E_PTS + 1;
      k := j + PARAMETERS.F_PTS + 1;
      if REALCOMPARE(TriangleArea(i, j, k), PARAMETERS.AREA1) = GT then
      begin
        CMV[11] := true;
        Break;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 12: two points separated by G_PTS intervening points, X[j]-X[i] < 0 }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 3 then
  begin
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.G_PTS - 1 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.G_PTS + 1;
      if REALCOMPARE(X[j] - X[i], 0.0) = LT then
      begin
        CMV[12] := true;
        Break;
      end;
    end;
  end;

  { LIC 13: two parts: distance > LENGTH1 AND distance < LENGTH2, both with K_PTS separation }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 3 then
  begin
    hasGreater := false;
    hasLesser := false;
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.K_PTS - 1 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.K_PTS + 1;
      d := Dist(i, j);
      if REALCOMPARE(d, PARAMETERS.LENGTH1) = GT then
        hasGreater := true;
      if REALCOMPARE(d, PARAMETERS.LENGTH2) = LT then
        hasLesser := true;
    end;
    CMV[13] := hasGreater and hasLesser;
  end;

  { LIC 14: not in circle RADIUS1 AND in circle RADIUS2, both with A_PTS, B_PTS separation }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 5 then
  begin
    hasGreater := false;
    hasLesser := false;
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.A_PTS - PARAMETERS.B_PTS - 2 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.A_PTS + 1;
      k := j + PARAMETERS.B_PTS + 1;
      d := CircumcircleRadius(i, j, k);
      if REALCOMPARE(d, PARAMETERS.RADIUS1) = GT then
        hasGreater := true;
      if REALCOMPARE(d, PARAMETERS.RADIUS2) = LT then
        hasLesser := true;
    end;
    CMV[14] := hasGreater and hasLesser;
  end;

  { LIC 15: area > AREA1 AND area < AREA2, both with E_PTS, F_PTS separation }
  if NUMPOINTS >= 5 then
  begin
    hasGreater := false;
    hasLesser := false;
    for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - PARAMETERS.E_PTS - PARAMETERS.F_PTS - 2 do
    begin
      j := i + PARAMETERS.E_PTS + 1;
      k := j + PARAMETERS.F_PTS + 1;
      area := TriangleArea(i, j, k);
      if REALCOMPARE(area, PARAMETERS.AREA1) = GT then
        hasGreater := true;
      if REALCOMPARE(area, PARAMETERS.AREA2) = LT then
        hasLesser := true;
    end;
    CMV[15] := hasGreater and hasLesser;
  end;

  { PUM: off-diagonal from LCM, diagonal from input }
  for i := 1 to 15 do
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if i = j then
        PUM[i, j] := PUM[i, j]
      else
      begin
        case LCM[i, j] of
          NOTUSED: PUM[i, j] := true;
          ANDD:    PUM[i, j] := CMV[i] and CMV[j];
          ORR:     PUM[i, j] := CMV[i] or CMV[j];
        end;
      end;
    end;

  { FUV }
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if not PUM[i, i] then
      FUV[i] := true
    else
    begin
      found := true;
      for j := 1 to 15 do
        if not PUM[i, j] then
        begin
          found := false;
          Break;
        end;
      FUV[i] := found;
    end;
  end;

  { LAUNCH }
  LAUNCH := true;
  for i := 1 to 15 do
    if not FUV[i] then
    begin
      LAUNCH := false;
      Break;
    end;
end;

{ JSON reading }
var
  InputBuf: string;
  InputPos: integer;

procedure SkipWhitespace;
begin
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] <= ' ') do
    Inc(InputPos);
end;

function ReadString: string;
var
  s: string;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] <> '"' then
  begin
    ReadString := '';
    Exit;
  end;
  Inc(InputPos);
  s := '';
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] <> '"') do
  begin
    if InputBuf[InputPos] = '\' then
    begin
      Inc(InputPos);
      if InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) then
        s := s + InputBuf[InputPos];
    end
    else
      s := s + InputBuf[InputPos];
    Inc(InputPos);
  end;
  if InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) then Inc(InputPos);
  ReadString := s;
end;

function ReadReal: real;
var
  s: string;
  start: integer;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  start := InputPos;
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and
        ((InputBuf[InputPos] in ['0'..'9', '.', '-', '+', 'e', 'E'])) do
    Inc(InputPos);
  s := Copy(InputBuf, start, InputPos - start);
  ReadReal := StrToFloat(s);
end;

function ReadInt: integer;
var
  s: string;
  start: integer;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  start := InputPos;
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] in ['0'..'9', '-']) do
    Inc(InputPos);
  s := Copy(InputBuf, start, InputPos - start);
  ReadInt := StrToInt(s);
end;

function ReadBool: boolean;
var
  s: string;
  start: integer;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  start := InputPos;
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] in ['a'..'z', 'A'..'Z']) do
    Inc(InputPos);
  s := Copy(InputBuf, start, InputPos - start);
  ReadBool := (s = 'true');
end;

procedure ReadObjectStart;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = '{' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadObjectEnd;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = '}' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadArrayStart;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = '[' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadArrayEnd;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = ']' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadComma;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = ',' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadColon;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = ':' then Inc(InputPos);
end;

procedure ReadRealArray(var arr: array of real; count: integer);
var
  i: integer;
begin
  ReadArrayStart;
  for i := 0 to count - 1 do
  begin
    arr[i] := ReadReal;
    if i < count - 1 then ReadComma;
  end;
  ReadArrayEnd;
end;

procedure ReadBoolArray(var arr: array of boolean; count: integer);
var
  i: integer;
begin
  ReadArrayStart;
  for i := 0 to count - 1 do
  begin
    arr[i] := ReadBool;
    if i < count - 1 then ReadComma;
  end;
  ReadArrayEnd;
end;

procedure ReadLCM;
var
  i, j: integer;
  s: string;
begin
  ReadArrayStart;
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    ReadArrayStart;
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      s := ReadString;
      if s = 'NOTUSED' then LCM[i, j] := NOTUSED
      else if s = 'ORR' then LCM[i, j] := ORR
      else if s = 'ANDD' then LCM[i, j] := ANDD;
      if j < 15 then ReadComma;
    end;
    ReadArrayEnd;
    if i < 15 then ReadComma;
  end;
  ReadArrayEnd;
end;

procedure ReadInput;
var
  key: string;
  tmpArr: array[1..15] of boolean;
  li, lj: integer;
begin
  ReadObjectStart;
  while InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) do
  begin
    SkipWhitespace;
    if InputBuf[InputPos] = '}' then Break;
    key := ReadString;
    ReadColon;
    if key = 'numpoints' then
    begin
      NUMPOINTS := ReadInt;
    end
    else if key = 'x' then
    begin
      ReadRealArray(X, NUMPOINTS);
    end
    else if key = 'y' then
    begin
      ReadRealArray(Y, NUMPOINTS);
    end
    else if key = 'parameters' then
    begin
      ReadObjectStart;
      while InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) do
      begin
        SkipWhitespace;
        if InputBuf[InputPos] = '}' then Break;
        key := ReadString;
        ReadColon;
        if key = 'LENGTH1' then PARAMETERS.LENGTH1 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'RADIUS1' then PARAMETERS.RADIUS1 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'EPSILON' then PARAMETERS.EPSILON := ReadReal
        else if key = 'AREA1' then PARAMETERS.AREA1 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'Q_PTS' then PARAMETERS.Q_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'QUADS' then PARAMETERS.QUADS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'DIST' then PARAMETERS.DIST := ReadReal
        else if key = 'N_PTS' then PARAMETERS.N_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'K_PTS' then PARAMETERS.K_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'A_PTS' then PARAMETERS.A_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'B_PTS' then PARAMETERS.B_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'C_PTS' then PARAMETERS.C_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'D_PTS' then PARAMETERS.D_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'E_PTS' then PARAMETERS.E_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'F_PTS' then PARAMETERS.F_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'G_PTS' then PARAMETERS.G_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'LENGTH2' then PARAMETERS.LENGTH2 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'RADIUS2' then PARAMETERS.RADIUS2 := ReadReal
        else if key = 'AREA2' then PARAMETERS.AREA2 := ReadReal;
        ReadComma;
      end;
      ReadObjectEnd;
    end
    else if key = 'lcm' then
    begin
      ReadLCM;
    end
    else if key = 'pum_diag' then
    begin
      ReadBoolArray(tmpArr, 15);
      for li := 1 to 15 do
      begin
        for lj := 1 to 15 do
          PUM[li, lj] := false;
        PUM[li, li] := tmpArr[li];
      end;
    end;
    ReadComma;
  end;
  ReadObjectEnd;
end;

procedure WriteOutput;
var
  i, j: integer;
  s: string;
begin

function REALCOMPARE(A, B: real): COMPTYPE;
var
  scale, eps, diff: real;
begin
  scale := Abs(A);
  if Abs(B) > scale then
    scale := Abs(B);
  if scale = 0.0 then
  begin
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
    Exit;
  end;

  eps := 0.5e-5 * scale;
  diff := A - B;
  if diff > eps then
    REALCOMPARE := GT
  else if diff < -eps then
    REALCOMPARE := LT
  else
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
end;

function Dist(i, j: integer): real;
begin
  Dist := Sqrt(Sqr(X[i] - X[j]) + Sqr(Y[i] - Y[j]));
end;

function CircumcircleRadius(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  a, b, c, s, area: real;
begin
  a := Dist(i, j);
  b := Dist(j, k);
  c := Dist(i, k);
  s := (a + b + c) / 2.0;
  area := Sqrt(Abs(s * (s - a) * (s - b) * (s - c)));
  if area < 1e-12 then
  begin
    if (REALCOMPARE(a, 0.0) = EQ) and (REALCOMPARE(b, 0.0) = EQ) and (REALCOMPARE(c, 0.0) = EQ) then
      CircumcircleRadius := 0.0
    else
      CircumcircleRadius := 1e30
  end
  else
    CircumcircleRadius := (a * b * c) / (4.0 * area);
end;

function TriangleArea(i, j, k: integer): real;
begin
  TriangleArea := Abs((X[j] - X[i]) * (Y[k] - Y[i]) - (X[k] - X[i]) * (Y[j] - Y[i])) / 2.0;
end;

function AngleAtVertex(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  dx1, dy1, dx2, dy2, dot, mag1, mag2, cosVal: real;
begin
  dx1 := X[i] - X[j];
  dy1 := Y[i] - Y[j];
  dx2 := X[k] - X[j];
  dy2 := Y[k] - Y[j];
  mag1 := Sqrt(dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1);
  mag2 := Sqrt(dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2);
  if (REALCOMPARE(mag1, 0.0) = EQ) or (REALCOMPARE(mag2, 0.0) = EQ) then
  begin
    AngleAtVertex := -1.0;
    Exit;
  end;
  dot := (dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2) / (mag1 * mag2);
  if dot > 1.0 then dot := 1.0;
  if dot < -1.0 then dot := -1.0;
  AngleAtVertex := ArcCos(dot);
end;

function GetQuadrant(i: integer): integer;
begin
  if REALCOMPARE(X[i], 0.0) = GT then
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = GT then GetQuadrant := 1
    else if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = LT then GetQuadrant := 4
    else GetQuadrant := 1;
  end
  else if REALCOMPARE(X[i], 0.0) = LT then
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = GT then GetQuadrant := 2
    else if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = LT then GetQuadrant := 3
    else GetQuadrant := 2;
  end
  else
  begin
    if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = GT then GetQuadrant := 1
    else if REALCOMPARE(Y[i], 0.0) = LT then GetQuadrant := 3
    else GetQuadrant := 1;
  end;
end;

function PointToLineDist(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2: real): real;
var
  dx, dy, num: real;
begin
  dx := x2 - x1;
  dy := y2 - y1;
  num := Abs(dy * px - dx * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1);
  if REALCOMPARE(Sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy), 0.0) = EQ then
    PointToLineDist := Sqrt(Sqr(px - x1) + Sqr(py - y1))
  else
    PointToLineDist := num / Sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
end;

{ JSON reading }
var
  InputBuf: string;
  InputPos: integer;

procedure SkipWhitespace;
begin
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] <= ' ') do
    Inc(InputPos);
end;

function ReadString: string;
var
  s: string;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] <> '"' then
  begin
    ReadString := '';
    Exit;
  end;
  Inc(InputPos);
  s := '';
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] <> '"') do
  begin
    if InputBuf[InputPos] = '\' then
    begin
      Inc(InputPos);
      if InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) then
        s := s + InputBuf[InputPos];
    end
    else
      s := s + InputBuf[InputPos];
    Inc(InputPos);
  end;
  if InputPos <= Length(InputBuf) then Inc(InputPos);
  ReadString := s;
end;

function ReadReal: real;
var
  s: string;
  start: integer;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  start := InputPos;
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and
        ((InputBuf[InputPos] in ['0'..'9', '.', '-', '+', 'e', 'E'])) do
    Inc(InputPos);
  s := Copy(InputBuf, start, InputPos - start);
  ReadReal := StrToFloat(s);
end;

function ReadInt: integer;
var
  s: string;
  start: integer;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  start := InputPos;
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] in ['0'..'9', '-']) do
    Inc(InputPos);
  s := Copy(InputBuf, start, InputPos - start);
  ReadInt := StrToInt(s);
end;

function ReadBool: boolean;
var
  s: string;
  start: integer;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  start := InputPos;
  while (InputPos <= Length(InputBuf)) and (InputBuf[InputPos] in ['a'..'z', 'A'..'Z']) do
    Inc(InputPos);
  s := Copy(InputBuf, start, InputPos - start);
  ReadBool := (s = 'true');

procedure ReadObjectStart;

end;

procedure ReadObjectEnd;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if InputBuf[InputPos] = '}' then Inc(InputPos);

procedure ReadArrayStart;

  SkipWhitespace;

var

    if i < count - 1 then ReadComma;

end;

procedure ReadBoolArray(var arr: array of boolean; count: integer);

begin

procedure ReadLCM;

        else if key = 'Q_PTS' then PARAMETERS.Q_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'QUADS' then PARAMETERS.QUADS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'DIST' then PARAMETERS.DIST := ReadReal
        else if key = 'N_PTS' then PARAMETERS.N_PTS := ReadInt

        else if key = 'A_PTS' then PARAMETERS.A_PTS := ReadInt
        else if key = 'B_PTS' then PARAMETERS.B_PTS := ReadInt

procedure WriteOutput;
var
  i, j: integer;
  s: string;
begin
  s := '{"cmv":[';

  begin
    if CMV[i] then s := s + 'true' else s := s + 'false';
    if i < 15 then s := s + ',';
  end;

  end;
